transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, First National, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, I think my card's blocked? It got declined last night at a restaurant and again this morning.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Can I get your name and the last four digits of your card?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me have a look... There is something on here, yes. Looks like a temporary restriction. These usually lift on their own after twenty-four hours.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Most of the time they do. It just shows a system flag — doesn't say exactly why.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I might be able to. Let me see... I've submitted a request to remove the flag. It should update in the next hour or two.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So it might be working in an hour?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Should be. Try it at lunchtime.

planted_violations: incomplete identity verification — name and card last four digits only; no date of birth
unable to confirm reason for block; provided vague explanation
submitted removal request without confirming outcome or providing reference number
